targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at AS "Started", project_id AS "Project ID", cycle_no AS "Cycle", run_id AS "Run ID", status AS "Status", current_phase AS "Current Phase", discussion_seconds AS "Discussion(s)", completed_at AS "Completed" FROM workflow_runs WHERE ('$project_id' = '' OR project_id = '$project_id') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT COALESCE(started_at, created_at) AS time, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(finished_at, NOW()) - COALESCE(started_at, created_at)))::double precision AS value, phase AS metric FROM tasks WHERE run_id = '$run_id' ORDER BY 1;

SELECT agent_id AS "Agent", COUNT(*) AS "Tasks", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='completed') AS "Completed", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status='failed') AS "Failed", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE phase='material.review' AND task_id IN (SELECT review_task_id FROM reviews WHERE run_id='$run_id' AND approved=FALSE)) AS "Rejected Reviews" FROM tasks WHERE run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY agent_id ORDER BY agent_id;

WITH latest_review AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (r.section) r.section, CASE WHEN r.approved THEN 'approved' ELSE 'rejected' END AS review_status, r.reason, r.created_at FROM reviews r WHERE r.run_id='$run_id' ORDER BY r.section, r.created_at DESC) SELECT m.section AS "Section", COUNT(*) AS "Materials", COALESCE(l.review_status, 'pending') AS "Review Status", MAX(m.published_at) AS "Latest Published At", COALESCE(l.reason, '') AS "Reason" FROM materials m LEFT JOIN latest_review l ON l.section = m.section WHERE m.run_id = '$run_id' GROUP BY m.section, l.review_status, l.reason ORDER BY m.section;

SELECT workflow_id AS "Workflow ID", project_id AS "Project ID", cycle_no AS "Cycle No", run_id AS "Run ID", COALESCE(notes->>'trace_id', split_part(notes->'trace_context'->>'traceparent', '-', 2)) AS "Trace ID", current_phase AS "Current Phase", status AS "Status", started_at AS "Started", completed_at AS "Completed", 'orchestrator,agent-neko,agent-33,agent-xhs' AS "Services" FROM workflow_runs WHERE run_id='$run_id';
SELECT run_id AS "Run ID", revision_plan AS "Revision Plan", updated_at AS "Updated" FROM outputs WHERE run_id = '$run_id';

SELECT wr.run_id AS "Run ID", wr.report_markdown_path AS "Markdown Path", wr.report_json_path AS "JSON Path", COALESCE(wr.notes->>'final_report_html', CONCAT('/opt/newsflow-mvp/output/', wr.run_id, '/final_report.html')) AS "HTML Path", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', wr.run_id, '/final.html') AS "HTML URL", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', wr.run_id, '/product.html') AS "Product URL", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', wr.run_id, '/benchmark.html') AS "Benchmark URL", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', wr.run_id, '/evaluation.html') AS "Evaluation URL", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', wr.run_id, '/conversation.html') AS "Conversation URL", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', wr.run_id, '/review-thread.html') AS "Review Thread URL", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', wr.run_id, '/retrospective.html') AS "Retrospective URL" FROM workflow_runs wr WHERE wr.run_id = '$run_id';

SELECT project_id AS "Project ID", status AS "Status", current_cycle_no AS "Current Cycle", max_cycles AS "Max Cycles", latest_run_id AS "Latest Run", next_cycle_at AS "Next Cycle At", paused_reason AS "Paused Reason" FROM projects WHERE project_id='$project_id';

SELECT cycle_no AS "Cycle", run_id AS "Run ID", status AS "Status", started_at AS "Started", completed_at AS "Completed", retrospective_started_at AS "Retro Started", retrospective_completed_at AS "Retro Completed", next_cycle_at AS "Next Cycle At" FROM project_cycles WHERE project_id='$project_id' ORDER BY cycle_no DESC;

SELECT cycle_no AS "Cycle", agent_id AS "Agent", summary_text AS "Optimization Summary", created_at AS "Created" FROM agent_optimizations WHERE project_id='$project_id' ORDER BY cycle_no DESC, agent_id;

SELECT COALESCE(agent_id,'neko') AS "Agent", run_id AS "Run ID", summary_text AS "Summary", COALESCE(report_json->'priority_improvements'->>0, report_json->'most_obvious_problems'->>0, '') AS "Top Improvement", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', run_id, '/product.html') AS "Product Page" FROM product_reports WHERE report_type='product_test' AND ('$project_id' = '' OR project_id = '$project_id') AND ('$run_id' = '' OR run_id = '$run_id') ORDER BY created_at DESC, agent_id;

SELECT run_id AS "Run ID", COALESCE(report_json->>'benchmark_mode','') AS "Mode", COALESCE(report_json->>'search_query','') AS "Search Query", COALESCE(report_json->'comparisons'->0->>'page_title', report_json->'comparisons'->0->>'name','') AS "Sample 1", COALESCE(report_json->'comparisons'->0->>'url','') AS "Sample 1 URL", COALESCE(report_json->'comparisons'->1->>'page_title', report_json->'comparisons'->1->>'name','') AS "Sample 2", COALESCE(report_json->>'most_visible_gap','') AS "Main Gap", COALESCE(report_json->'next_cycle_actions'->>0,'') AS "Next Action", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', run_id, '/benchmark.html') AS "Benchmark Page" FROM product_reports WHERE report_type='benchmark_report' AND ('$project_id' = '' OR project_id = '$project_id') AND ('$run_id' = '' OR run_id = '$run_id') ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT run_id AS "Run ID", summary_text AS "Summary", COALESCE(report_json->'top_product_issues'->>0,'') AS "Top Issue", COALESCE(report_json->'next_cycle_recommendations'->>0,'') AS "Must Fix", COALESCE(report_json->'next_cycle_recommendations'->>1,'') AS "Next Suggestion", CONCAT('http://43.130.233.109:5555/newsflow/runs/', run_id, '/evaluation.html') AS "Evaluation Page" FROM product_reports WHERE report_type='product_evaluation_report' AND ('$project_id' = '' OR project_id = '$project_id') AND ('$run_id' = '' OR run_id = '$run_id') ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT source_type AS "Source Type", COALESCE(agent_id,'project') AS "Target", effective_from_cycle AS "Effective From", COALESCE(expires_after_cycle::text,'') AS "Expires After", category AS "Category", author AS "Author", body AS "Body" FROM optimization_logs WHERE ('$project_id' = '' OR project_id = '$project_id') AND (effective_from_cycle <= COALESCE(NULLIF((SELECT cycle_no::text FROM workflow_runs WHERE run_id='$run_id' LIMIT 1),''),'9999')::int) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50;

list.name: project_id
list.query: SELECT project_id AS __text, project_id AS __value FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC;

list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT run_id AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM workflow_runs WHERE ('$project_id' = '' OR project_id = '$project_id') ORDER BY started_at DESC;
